reply.text: I need you to explain yourself and the lawyer can wait

messages.text: you come back quicker than my notifications
back it up or fall back
you resist like there’s points on the board
you said that like i was impressed
you argue like cross examination is a hobby
keep talking, this is still weak
i showed my friends before i even replied
you want a yes, work for it
you’re lowkey enjoying disagreeing with me
